content: In the preparation of sodium fusion extract, the purpose of fusing organic compound with a piece of sodium metal is to

options.content: Convert the organic compound into vapour state
Convert the elements of the compound from covalent form to ionic form
Convert the elements of the compound from ionic form to covalent form
Decrease the melting point of the compound

explanation: The purpose of sodium fusion extract is to convert the element in the organic compound into ionic compound so that the detection could become easier.
